title: dieteria canescens var. shastensis
intro: Dieteria canescens var. shastensis, also known as Shasta dieteria, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is a flowering plant that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The plant is said to have medicinal properties that can help soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Shasta dieteria can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for internal use, and it can also be applied topically as a salve or poultice for external applications.
